Quality Education.reason: The course is tertiary education (4.3) promoting indigenous language and culture, fostering cultural diversity appreciation (4.7) and inclusion of indigenous peoples (4.5).

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course indirectly supports Target 8.9 by promoting indigenous culture, which can contribute to sustainable tourism.

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports a connection to industry, innovation, or infrastructure.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The course directly promotes social inclusion and recognition of indigenous peoples (Target 10.2) by fostering respect for their language and culture.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: Teaching and preserving an indigenous language directly supports safeguarding cultural heritage (Target 11.4).
